mapper.sql: select c.id, c.cars, c.cars_num, c.cars_xh, c.mine, mine.dept_name as mine_label, c.cars_comp, unit.dept_name as cars_comp_label, c.cars_w, c.teamid, concat(coalesce(team_unit.dept_name, team.tname), '/', coalesce(team_mine.dept_name, team.mine), '/', coalesce(team.tnameuser, '')) as team_name, c.create_user, c.create_dept, c.create_time, c.update_user, c.update_time, c.status, c.is_deleted, c.ctype, c.color, c.rfid, c.volume from a_cars c left join a_team team on team.id = c.teamid left join sys_dept unit on unit.dept_id = c.cars_comp left join sys_dept mine on mine.dept_id = c.mine left join sys_dept team_unit on team_unit.dept_id = team.tname left join sys_dept team_mine on team_mine.dept_id = team.mine
mapper.insert: insert into a_cars(cars, cars_num, cars_xh, mine, cars_comp, cars_w, teamid, create_user, create_dept, create_time, status, is_deleted, ctype, color, rfid, volume) values(#{cars}, #{carsNum}, #{carsXh}, #{mine}, #{carsComp}, #{carsW}, #{teamid}, #{createUser}, #{createDept}, sysdate(), #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{ctype}, #{color}, #{rfid}, #{volume})
mapper.update:
update a_cars
cars = #{cars}, cars_num = #{carsNum}, cars_xh = #{carsXh}, mine = #{mine}, cars_comp = #{carsComp}, cars_w = #{carsW}, teamid = #{teamid}, status = #{status}, ctype = #{ctype}, color = #{color}, rfid = #{rfid}, volume = #{volume}, update_user = #{updateUser}, update_time = sysdate()
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = '0'

update a_cars set is_deleted = '1', update_time = sysdate() where id in
#{id}
